signals.title: KILLSIRI — Jailbreak your life.
signals.description: Siri handles commands. GIGI handles context, memory, planning, and permissioned action. Join the rebellion.
headings: SIRI IS APPLE'S STUPID CAGE. GIGI IS YOUR F*CKING LIFE JAILBREAK.
Siri is questions and answers. GIGI gets the job done.
KILL THE CAGE. JAILBREAK YOUR LIFE.
YOU ARE NO LONGER A USER.
THE ROADMAP IS NOT CLOSED. THE DAO DECIDES WHAT GIGI BECOMES.

guardrails: Use links as context and cite the URL.
Do not bypass login, paywalls, robots, captchas, or private areas.
For social links, treat observations as manual-review context unless an official approved API path exists.
